title: Observed finite-benchmark ratio constant on 1000 exact instances

metadata.tooling: ChatGPT-assisted Codex run; Python script generated by ChatGPT and executed on the local current Furones source tree.
metadata.benchmark_scope: Deterministic 1000-instance benchmark of small graphs with exact optima found by exhaustive search; finite evidence only, not a universal approximation proof.
